content: We can frame the original Self-Refine framework as a single-perspective iterative self-improvement process, and integrate multi-perspective inconsistency capture from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to build a hierarchical self-refinement system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervised data while fixing its blind spot of unrecognized errors within a single reasoning frame. This hybrid framework would enable LLMs to catch inconsistent logic or suboptimal output that a single-perspective Self-Refine would miss, without adding the overhead of external data or model fine-tuning.
